uniformText: Clean, simple and built for active children  white & green sportswear with our school crest, worn with pride on and off the field.
careersText: We're always looking for passionate teachers and staff who share our commitment to nurturing young minds. If you're interested in working with us, send us your CV and we'll get in touch.
admissionSubtext: Spaces are limited at every level  secure your child's seat today.
heroHeading: Give your child the best foundation for a brighter future.
aboutLead: Every classroom, every column, every gate on our campus was built with one generation in mind: yours.
heroEyebrow: Uruan LGA · Uyo, Akwa Ibom state - Nigeria
galleryClassroomsHeading: Bright rooms, ready to learn in
footerAbout: Building future leaders through knowledge and discipline. Creche, Nursery, Primary and Secondary education in Uruan LGA, Akwa Ibom State —Nigeria
heroLede: Global Hilton International Academy is a government-approved school offering Creche, Nursery, Primary and Secondary education  built on sound discipline, modern teaching, and genuine care for every child.
aboutHeading: A new academy, built for the long term
admissionHeading: Admission is now open for the new session.
aboutParaOne: Global Hilton International Academy is located at #15 Ikot Akpakang Road, Ibiaku Obio Ndobo, off Airport Road in Uruan LGA. Our campus was purpose-built  not converted from another use  with proper classroom blocks, a perimeter wall for safety, and space for children to learn and play without crowding.
galleryCampusText: From classroom blocks to the perimeter wall  every part of our campus was built with your child's safety and comfort in mind.
galleryClassroomsText: Every classroom is painted, furnished, and decorated to make young learners feel at home from day one.
aboutParaTwo: We run a full pathway from Early Childhood Education (Creche & Nursery) through Primary, Junior Secondary and Senior Secondary School, so a child can grow with us from their very first day of school to graduation.
locationAddress: #15 Ikot Akpakang Road, Ibiaku Obio Ndobo, Off Airport Road, Uruan LGA, Akwa Ibom State, Nigeria.
